description: PM Modi announces sudden demonetization of Rs 500 and Rs 1000 notes, affecting 86% of India's currency in circulation
outcome_notes: Massive bank queues, cash shortage for months, GDP dip, widespread public anxiety

description: RBI makes emergency off-cycle rate hike of 40 basis points to combat rising inflation
outcome_notes: Sensex fell 1400 points, bond yields spiked, markets shocked by off-cycle decision

description: India posts 20.1% GDP growth in Q1 FY22, strongest quarterly growth on record
outcome_notes: Growth surprise, record equity highs, rising FII participation, and broad recovery confidence drove an upbeat market read

description: India faces pressure from western allies over Russia-Ukraine war stance as oil prices surge past 100 dollars, threatening inflation
outcome_notes: India maintained cautious diplomatic stance, rupee weakened but panic was contained

description: RBI orders Paytm Payments Bank to stop accepting deposits, triggering fintech sector concern and regulatory scrutiny of digital banking
outcome_notes: Paytm stock crashed 40% but broader fintech sector watched cautiously rather than panicking

description: Government slashes corporate tax rates for domestic companies and new manufacturing units, surprising markets with a large-growth stimulus
outcome_notes: Sensex and Nifty rallied sharply, cyclicals and financials surged, and the policy was treated as a strong pro-growth pivot

description: India announces a nationwide COVID-19 lockdown, freezing most transport, retail, and business activity with only a few hours notice
outcome_notes: Markets hit lower circuits, volatility exploded, and investors rushed toward cash, gold, and defensive positioning

description: Lok Sabha results show the NDA returning to power but with a weaker-than-expected mandate, forcing coalition dependence and policy repricing
outcome_notes: Initial shock selling was followed by selective recovery, leaving institutions and sectors split between continuity and policy-drift scenarios
